reason: Backend spec index for the active workflow/control-plane package.
Executable contracts for workflow registry, run ledgers, inspection, continue, cancel, approval, agent-task bridges, and panel routing.
Shared guide index for required pre-development thinking.
Ensure panel actions reuse existing continue/cancel/run-format helpers instead of creating duplicate workflow execution logic.
Map the workflow run data flow from JSONL ledger to PanelItem payload/detail to UI action helpers and tests.
